_comment: OPTIONAL. References the community ProxmoxMCP-Plus server (https://github.com/RekklesNA/ProxmoxMCP-Plus). The proxmox skills work without any MCP server via the REST API + scripts/pve-api.sh. To enable this server, install ProxmoxMCP-Plus and set the env vars below (e.g. in your shell or Claude Code env). Never commit real credentials. Verify the launch command against the server's current README — packaging changes over time.
